assessment_meta.notes: Real manual screen using listing evidence plus limited public planning-context checks. Conservative placeholders retained where authoritative site-report fields were not fully verified in-session.

site.access_notes: Existing electric sliding gate and tar-sealed driveway noted in listing. Access exists at screen level, but exact frontage and subdivision access arrangement remain unverified.

residential_subdivision_use_case.notes: Target use case matches MVP scope. Large parcel with stated future scope makes it relevant to residential subdivision screening.

current_zone.notes: Current zone not verified from authoritative council mapping/site report in this pass.

local_plan_precinct.notes: Local plan / precinct not verified in this pass. Buderim village proximity is positive context but not a planning control confirmation.

minimum_lot_size.notes: Minimum lot size or equivalent subdivision threshold not verified from authoritative controls.

effective_yield.notes: Very large site area is a strong positive signal. However, without zoning, topographic, environmental, access, and minimum lot size controls, no reliable indicative lot count should be asserted.

frontage_access.notes: Existing access is present, but exact frontage, secondary access options, and subdivision access practicality are not yet verified.

flood.notes: Flood status not verified from authoritative mapping in this pass.

steep_land_landslide.notes: Steep land / landslide overlays are especially material for this larger Buderim parcel and were not verified in this pass.

biodiversity_waterways.notes: Biodiversity / waterway constraints not verified from authoritative mapping in this pass.

prior_application_history.notes: Listing states council approval already exists for a granny flat and 12x12 shed. This is relevant planning history but needs authoritative DA verification and does not itself prove subdivision pathway.

critical_unknowns: Minimum lot size / subdivision threshold not verified
Steep land / landslide status not checked
Exact prior application history and approvals not checked
next_actions: Obtain authoritative site report or council mapping output for zoning and local plan / precinct
Verify minimum lot size and any subdivision frontage requirements from applicable controls
Check flood, steep land / landslide, and biodiversity / waterways overlays
Verify the stated granny flat / shed approval history in Development.i / council records
Assess whether site shape, access, and topography materially constrain yield despite large area

sources.reference_text: realestate.com.au listing: 16 Mons Road, Buderim, Qld 4556 (property-house-qld-buderim-150297212)
Listing text states 1.15ha site and council approval in place for granny flat and 12x12 shed
Sunshine Coast Council Development.i path identified but site-specific zoning/overlay data not fully verified in-session
